name: Insulin Signaling Pathway
description: Insulin receptor → IRS-1 → PI3K/AKT pathway for glucose uptake and metabolism

name: Insulin Structure & Processing
description: Preproinsulin → proinsulin → mature insulin (A+B chains linked by disulfide bonds)

name: Protein-Protein Interaction
description: Insulin binding induces receptor dimerization and autophosphorylation cascade

name: Mechanism of Action
description: Compare Type 1 (autoimmune beta cell destruction) vs Type 2 (insulin resistance)

name: Endocrine & Cell Biology Icons
description: Icons for beta cells, islets of Langerhans, glucose transporters, insulin granules
